overview: A premium light-mode sports scoreboard manager for DSSPL (Dev Sanskriti School Premier League) with 17 sports, 7 competing dals, live scoreboards, leaderboard, and medal tally.
features: Collapsible sidebar navigation with 7 main pages and 17 sport sections
Minimal clean dashboard with quick match setup and stats
Live scoreboard with timer, score controls, and match management
Leaderboard with dal rankings and points table
Match schedule and reports with analytics
17 dedicated sport scoreboard pages with shared template
Premium gold and royal blue branding
